name: upy-deploy-plugin
description: Workflow plugin phase for deploying generated MicroPython firmware projects, capturing device output, and routing user feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Deploys generated MicroPython projects and captures run results.
interface.longDescription: Consumes upy-generate-plugin phase_complete manifest_content, supports upload-only, clean-then-upload, and erase-then-upload deploy strategies, captures serial output and device logs, then routes user feedback to generate fix, autofix, or project publishing.
defaultPrompt: Run deploy from a generate phase_complete.
Deploy a generated MicroPython project after cleaning old device files.
Capture device output and choose the next workflow action.
